title: TrainingChatMessageV1
description: One row in PULSE_CHAT_QUEUE / PULSE_CHAT_MESSAGE. User questions are queued when the remote Ollama endpoint is unreachable; assistant replies stream back via the worker.

context_snapshot.description: Frozen plan + recent-session bundle attached to the user question at send time. Assistant reply re-uses this rather than re-fetching.

extracted_proposal_id.description: If the assistant suggested a plan change, the corresponding PULSE_ADJUSTMENT_PROPOSAL row id.
